The .ubv files in this folder were created with `create-ubv` from ffmpeg
testsrc2 input. As such they are not faithful representations of UBV metadata
seen in real Unifi recordings: for that see ../anonymised/ samples.

  testsrc2.ubv      — H.264 + AAC, 640x480 @ 30 fps, 5 s.
  testsrc2_av1.ubv  — AV1 video-only, 320x240 @ 30 fps, 2 s.

See create-ubv/README.md for the regeneration recipe.
